ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the post */,
  "n_tokens_title" INTEGER /* Number of tokens in the title */,
  "n_tokens_content" INTEGER /* Number of tokens in the content */,
  "num_imgs" INTEGER /* Number of images in the post */,
  "num_videos" INTEGER /* Number of videos in the post */,
  "average_token_length" REAL /* Average length of tokens in the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was published */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (article, video, image, etc.) */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of channel (lifestyle, entertainment, business, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_channel_type FOREIGN KEY ("channel_type") REFERENCES channel_info ("channel_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric record */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post associated with the metrics */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares the post received */,
  "shares_log" REAL /* Logarithmic value of shares for analysis */,
  "global_subjectivity" REAL /* Global subjectivity score of the content */,
  "global_sentiment_polarity" REAL /* Global sentiment polarity score of the content */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the post */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  "reactions" INTEGER /* Number of reactions on the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post associated with the metadata */,
  "weekday_is_friday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post was published on Friday (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "weekday_is_saturday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post was published on Saturday (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "weekday_is_sunday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post was published on Sunday (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "is_weekend" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post was published on a weekend (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "hour_of_day" INTEGER /* Hour of the day the post was published */,
  "audience_type" TEXT /* Type of audience (young adults, adults, elderly, etc.) */,
  "audience_location" TEXT /* Location of the audience (USA, Europe, Asia, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_metadata_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content analysis record */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post associated with the content analysis */,
  "title_subjectivity" REAL /* Subjectivity score of the post title */,
  "title_sentiment_polarity" REAL /* Sentiment polarity score of the post title */,
  "content_subjectivity" REAL /* Subjectivity score of the post content */,
  "content_sentiment_polarity" REAL /* Sentiment polarity score of the post content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_analysis_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_info" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of channel (lifestyle, entertainment, business, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platform_info" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_platform_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post associated with the performance metrics */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform associated with the performance metrics */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate of the post on the platform */,
  "click_through_rate" REAL /* Click-through rate of the post on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_platform_performance_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_platform_performance_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platform_info ("platform_id")
)
